synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19534 Oracle Linux 9 rdma-core bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19534
description:
[54.0-2]
- Fix data corruption in bnxt_re
- Resolves: RHEL-89425
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19534

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19534.html
